archimate:DataObject.name: Metadata
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Metadata ABB is a Data Object providing information about one or more aspects of the data
Source: W3C
Source reference: www.w3.org/Metadata/
Example: The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): https://data.europa.eu/en
Interoperability Dimension: Behavioral IoP
LOST view: Semantic view
Viewpoint: Key Interoperability Enablers viewpoint
Interoperability Saliency: The Metadata ABB is a key interoperability enabler (*) for behavioural interoperability by enabling data discoverability and reuse enhancing the delivery and collaboration between digital public services.
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MetadataDataObject
ABB name: eira:MetadataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MetadataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Metadata ABB is a Data Object providing information about one or more aspects of the data
The following implementation is an example on how this specific Architecture Building Block (ABB) can be instantiated as a Solution Building Block (SBB): https://data.europa.eu/en

The Metadata ABB is a key interoperability enabler (*) for behavioural interoperability by enabling data discoverability and reuse enhancing the delivery and collaboration between digital public services.
